justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering concrete alternatives, which led to a very long and frustrating conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for availability for the same day and time multiple times, and also asked for information the user had already provided.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was extremely frustrating due to the agent repeatedly reporting no availability and then asking the user to provide new times, without offering any concrete solutions or a wider range of options proactively.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively offer available slots or suggest a wider search range made this a very inefficient and frustrating experience for the user.
